H2: Windshield Decal FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Windshield Decals

Premium Vinyl Windshield Decals for Vehicles & Business Branding

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Design Your Windshield Decals Upload Your Design Choose Size & Quantity Select Material Options Add to Cart Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Premium Windshield Decals for Vehicles & Branding

Our custom windshield decals are manufactured from premium vinyl material, making them the perfect solution for vehicle identification, business branding, and promotional displays. These durable windshield decals are designed specifically for automotive glass applications, providing excellent adhesion and weather resistance for both commercial and personal vehicles. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Whether you need windshield decals for fleet vehicles, company cars, or personal branding, our high-quality vinyl construction ensures your design maintains its appearance and readability through various weather conditions. Each windshield decal is precision-cut to your specifications and can accommodate complex designs, text, and logos.

Choose from multiple cutting options including die-cut for individual decals, kiss-cut for easy peeling, or transfer-cut for detailed vinyl lettering applications. Our windshield decals work perfectly for business identification, promotional campaigns, or personal vehicle customization projects.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Windshield Decal Order Process & Design Options

Ordering custom windshield decals is straightforward with our streamlined design and approval process. Start by either using our online design tool to create your windshield decal from scratch, or upload your own artwork file for professional production.

Design Process

Our easy-to-use online designer allows you to quickly create windshield decals by uploading images or logos from your computer, or choosing from our extensive clipart library. For original file uploads, we require .eps vector files to ensure the highest quality windshield decal production. Once you've finalized your design and added it to your cart, a digital proof will be emailed to you for approval.

Payment

All windshield decal orders must be paid in full before production begins. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards, as well as checks which must be received prior to your windshield decals entering production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your windshield decal order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system allows you to monitor your windshield decals through every stage of our production process, from order placement to delivery. Simply click the tracking link in your email to get real-time updates on your order status.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Windshield Decal Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule for windshield decals ranges from one to five business days, allowing you to choose the turnaround time that best fits your project timeline. Production time begins once your artwork upload is complete and approved, separate from shipping time.

1 Business Day Priority Production

For urgent windshield decal orders, our priority production option delivers in just one business day. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day. Emergency and same-day rush options are available in select cases - contact our customer service team for availability and pricing.

2 Business Days Express Production

The express production option is ideal when you need windshield decals quickly but have an extra day in your timeline. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day, with emergency rush options available in some cases.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option for windshield decals, standard production provides an excellent balance of speed and value. This free production upgrade is fast enough for most custom windshield decal projects while maintaining our high quality standards.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Choose our saver production option for windshield decals when timeline flexibility allows you to save on production costs. This option provides the same quality windshield decals at a reduced price point for orders with extended deadlines.

Important: Production turnaround begins when file upload is complete. If an order requires prepress review or proof approval, turnaround starts from the time approval is given. Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Windshield Decal Cut Options & Material Backing

Understanding the cutting method for your windshield decals is important for proper application and appearance. The main differences between our three cutting options relate to how the vinyl material and paper backing are processed during production.

Die-Cut Windshield Decals

Die-cut windshield decals are cut through both the vinyl material and paper backing, creating individually cut decals with no excess material around the design. Think of this like a "cookie cutter" approach - your windshield decals are precisely contoured to your design shape. Back slit (crack and peel) options are available on Standard and Permanent vinyl materials for easier installation.

Kiss-Cut Windshield Decals

Kiss-cut windshield decals are cut only through the vinyl layer, leaving the paper backing intact. This creates a paper border around your windshield decal design, making removal and positioning easier during application. The excess paper material provides a convenient grip for peeling and placement.

Transfer-Cut Windshield Decals

Transfer-cut windshield decals involve cutting the vinyl to your specified design, then removing excess vinyl material and applying transfer tape over the remaining pieces. This method is ideal for detailed text and complex windshield decal designs with multiple elements. Transfer tape holds all design pieces together for clean, even application to your windshield surface.

Note: Vector files (.eps or Adobe Illustrator) are required for transfer-cut windshield decals. Transfer cutting includes 8 standard picks with a maximum of 40 picks per square foot. Additional picks are charged $0.02 to $0.04 each depending on complexity.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Windshield Decal Artwork Requirements & File Specifications

Proper artwork preparation ensures your windshield decals print with crisp detail and accurate colors. Our production team works with various file formats, though vector files provide the best results for windshield decal printing.

Preferred File Types

For optimal windshield decal quality, submit Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script) or PDF files with a maximum file size of 100 MB. When submitting these files, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution during windshield decal production.

Additional File Formats

We also accept high-resolution JPG, TIFF, and PNG files for windshield decal printing. While these formats work well for photographic designs, vector formats provide superior results for text and logo-based windshield decals.

File Setup Tips

Set up your artwork proportionate to the exact windshield decal size you're ordering. Convert all text to outlines, allow for bleed only when necessary, and clearly indicate cut lines for all windshield decal products. Avoid flattening or merging layers in PSD files to maintain editing flexibility.

Transfer Cut Guidelines

Transfer-cut windshield decals require special consideration for optimal results. Use simple, open fonts with all text at least 1/2" tall. Maintain 1/8" spacing between characters and design elements, with main strokes and line weights at minimum 1/8" thickness. We recommend requesting a proof for all transfer-cut custom hard hat stickers and windshield decal orders to verify cut accuracy.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Windshield Decal Shipping Methods & Delivery Times

We offer multiple shipping options for windshield decals to meet various delivery timelines and budget requirements. Shipping time is separate from production time, so factor both into your project planning when ordering windshield decals.

Shipping Methods

Choose from standard ground shipping, expedited options, and priority overnight delivery for your windshield decals. Ground shipping typically takes 3-7 business days depending on your location, while expedited shipping reduces delivery time to 1-3 business days. Priority overnight ensures next-day delivery for urgent windshield decal orders.

Shipping Time Expectations

Windshield decal shipping begins immediately after production completion. Ground shipping provides economical delivery across the continental United States, while express options offer faster delivery when needed. International windshield decal shipping is available with extended delivery times and additional customs considerations.

Important Shipping Notes

Economy shipping for windshield decals may experience longer delivery times during peak seasons. Consider expedited shipping options if your windshield decal project has a firm deadline. All shipments include tracking information so you can monitor your windshield decal delivery progress. For bulk windshield decal orders, custom holographic vinyl material options may require additional shipping considerations due to size and weight.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Windshield Decal Installation & Application Guide

Proper installation ensures your windshield decals adhere correctly and maintain their appearance over time. Follow these step-by-step instructions for professional-looking results on automotive glass surfaces.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the windshield area thoroughly with glass cleaner or isopropyl alcohol to remove dirt, oils, and residue. Allow the surface to dry completely before applying windshield decals. Cold temperatures can affect adhesion, so install windshield decals in temperatures above 50°F when possible.

Applying the Decal

For die-cut and kiss-cut windshield decals, remove the backing paper and position carefully on the clean windshield surface. Start from one edge and gradually smooth the windshield decal across the glass, working out air bubbles with a squeegee or credit card. For crack and peel stickers and similar backing systems, use the pre-scored backing for easier removal.

Removing Transfer Tape

Transfer-cut windshield decals require careful transfer tape removal after application. Allow the windshield decal to set for several minutes, then slowly peel the transfer tape at a 45-degree angle. If any parts of the windshield decal lift with the tape, press down and continue removal more slowly to ensure complete adhesion to the glass surface.

For detailed video demonstrations of windshield decal installation techniques, refer to our installation guide library which covers various application methods and troubleshooting tips.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Windshield Decals?

Windshield decals are custom vinyl graphics specifically designed for application on automotive glass surfaces. Made from durable vinyl material with automotive-grade adhesive, windshield decals provide weather-resistant branding and identification solutions for vehicles. These decals are commonly used for business fleet identification, promotional displays, racing numbers, and personal vehicle customization. Windshield decals are applied to the interior surface of windshields to avoid interference with wipers while maintaining visibility and professional appearance.

Design Your Custom Windshield Decals Today

Transform your vehicle's appearance with professional windshield decals designed for lasting durability and visual impact. Our premium vinyl materials and precision cutting ensure your windshield decals maintain their quality through years of automotive use. Whether you need windshield decals for commercial fleet branding or personal vehicle customization, our flexible production options and expert craftsmanship deliver results that exceed expectations.

Start designing your windshield decals using our intuitive online design tool, or upload your existing artwork for professional production. With multiple cutting options, fast turnaround times, and comprehensive shipping solutions, creating custom windshield decals has never been easier. Order your windshield decals today and experience the quality difference that comes from premium materials and expert manufacturing.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Windshield Decal FAQs

How long do windshield decals last on automotive glass?

Quality windshield decals typically last 3-5 years when properly applied to clean glass surfaces. The lifespan depends on weather exposure, material quality, and installation location. Interior application extends durability compared to exterior placement.

What surfaces work best for windshield decals?

Windshield decals adhere best to clean, smooth glass surfaces. They work excellently on automotive windshields, rear windows, and side glass when properly cleaned and prepared. Avoid application over existing tinting or textured glass surfaces.

Can windshield decals be removed without damaging glass?

Yes, windshield decals can be safely removed from glass surfaces using heat and proper removal techniques. Warm the decal with a hair dryer to soften the adhesive, then peel slowly to avoid residue. Any remaining adhesive removes easily with glass cleaner.

What file format works best for windshield decal artwork?

Vector files (.eps or Adobe Illustrator) provide the best results for windshield decal printing, especially for text and logo designs. High-resolution JPG, PNG, and PDF files also work well for photographic windshield decal designs.

Do windshield decals interfere with vehicle safety inspections?

Windshield decal placement regulations vary by state and locality. Most areas allow small identification decals in lower corners but restrict coverage in the driver's line of sight. Check local regulations before designing windshield decals for compliance requirements.

What's the difference between interior and exterior windshield decal application?

Interior windshield decals are protected from weather and wiper contact, extending their lifespan significantly. Exterior application may face UV exposure and mechanical wear but offers easier installation. Most windshield decals are designed for interior application on the passenger side.

Can windshield decals be made with reflective materials?

While reflective materials are available for some decal applications, windshield decals typically use standard vinyl materials to avoid vision obstruction and comply with automotive safety regulations. Dry erase wall decals and similar specialty materials work better for non-automotive applications.
